mapper.select: SELECT pa.POLICY_NO AS policyNo, pa.LIST_NO AS listNo, pa.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, cu.NAME AS custName, cl.LIST_LASTPHONE AS listLastPhone, cl.LIST_STATUS AS listStatus, (SELECT a.SNO FROM tb_call_appointment a WHERE a.LIST_NO = cl.LIST_NO AND a.RECALL_RESULT = 0 ORDER BY a.RECALL_TIME DESC LIMIT 1) AS pendingAppointmentSno, (SELECT a.UPDATE_USER FROM tb_call_appointment a WHERE a.LIST_NO = cl.LIST_NO AND a.RECALL_RESULT = 0 ORDER BY a.RECALL_TIME DESC LIMIT 1) AS pendingAppointmentUser FROM tb_policy pa JOIN tb_call_list cl ON pa.LIST_NO = cl.LIST_NO JOIN tb_cust_user cu ON pa.MEMBER_ID = cu.MEMBER_ID WHERE pa.POLICY_NO = #{policyNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT a.SNO AS sno, a.REC_NO AS recNo, a.LIST_NO AS listNo, a.CAMP_CODE AS projectCode, p.CAMP_NAME AS projectName, a.RECALL_TIME AS recallTime, a.REC_TIME AS recTime, a.RECALL_RESULT AS recallResult FROM tb_call_appointment a LEFT JOIN tb_camp_mst p ON a.CAMP_CODE = p.CAMP_CODE WHERE a.LIST_NO = #{listNo} ORDER BY a.REC_NO DESC

SELECT SNO AS sno, REC_NO AS recNo, LIST_NO AS listNo, CAMP_CODE AS campCode, RECALL_TIME AS recallTime, REC_TIME AS recTime, RECALL_RESULT AS recallResult, CREATE_TIME AS createTime, UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime, UPDATE_USER AS updateUser FROM tb_call_appointment WHERE LIST_NO = #{listNo} AND RECALL_RESULT = 0 ORDER BY RECALL_TIME DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT MAX(REC_NO) FROM tb_call_appointment WHERE REC_NO LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_call_appointment ( REC_NO, LIST_NO, CAMP_CODE, RECALL_TIME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER ) VALUES ( #{recNo}, #{listNo}, #{campCode}, #{recallTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_call_appointment SET RECALL_RESULT = #{recallResult}, REC_TIME = #{recTime}, UPDATE_TIME = #{recTime}, UPDATE_USER = #{updateUser} WHERE SNO = #{sno} AND RECALL_RESULT = 0
